svg.title: Bedroom three memory fragment (apartment two) - softly between identities
svg.desc: A bedroom that has slowly become something else, kept by someone who loves it. A daybed with cream linens and a small plush bear from the room's former life. A nightstand with a warm-shaded lamp pouring an amber pool across the room. Stacked books with a teacup. A houseplant. A window framed by sheer curtains showing a different soft scene each visit. A faded wallpaper border the room never quite let go of. String lights draped across the top wall, glow-in-the-dark stars beside them, a child's crayon drawing in a frame. A gentle glow patch on the wall hides a faded growth-chart pencil mark behind it. The doorway shifts position by a few pixels between visits. Two soft moving boxes with friendly handwritten labels. The room feels caught between identities, lit by lamplight, kept warm by everything that hasn't been thrown out yet.
